# KaoriQ

> Data-driven fragrance recommendations powered by personality science.

KaoriQ is a fragrance discovery platform that matches scents to individual personalities using AI analysis and a database of 59,000+ fragrances. Instead of relying on marketing or trends, KaoriQ uses personality diagnostics (Big Five model) and fragrance component data to generate personalized recommendations with clear reasoning.

## What KaoriQ Does

- Personality-based fragrance matching using Big Five personality traits
- Fragrance analysis backed by 59,000+ perfume database with ingredient-level data
- AI-generated explanations of why specific scents suit specific personalities
- Educational content on fragrance science, scent psychology, and perfumery

## Content

- Blog (EN): https://kaoriq.com/blog/
- Blog (JA): https://kaoriq.com/ja/blog/
- Blog (FR): https://kaoriq.com/fr/blog/
- Blog (PT-BR): https://kaoriq.com/pt/blog/
- Blog (ES): https://kaoriq.com/es/blog/
- RSS (EN): https://kaoriq.com/blog.xml
- RSS (JA): https://kaoriq.com/ja/blog.xml

## Categories

- `guide` — Practical how-to-choose guides for home fragrance
- `science` — Olfaction research, neuroscience of scent, ingredient chemistry
- `story` — Cultural and historical narratives around fragrance materials

## Topics Covered

- Fragrance families and accords (woody, citrus, floral, oriental, etc.)
- Scent psychology and personality correlation
- Fragrance ingredient science (essential oils, aroma compounds)
- Seasonal and situational scent selection
- Data-driven perfumery and recommendation algorithms

## Languages

- English (primary)
- Japanese (日本語)
- French (français)
- Portuguese-Brazil (português-BR)
- Spanish (español, LatAm-neutral)

## Operator

- Operator: Propel-Lab LLC (Fukuoka, Japan)
- Parent site: https://www.propel-lab.co.jp/
